title: ZoomHehe
description: A lightweight, smooth, and fully customizable OptiFine-style cinematic zoom mod for Fabric.
body:
# ZoomHehe
ZoomHehe is a Fabric client-side Minecraft zoom mod created by AdarshHehe. It adds an OptiFine-style zoom feature with smooth animations and a highly customizable experience for better cinematic gameplay and improved viewing control.

## ✨ Features
- 🔍 Zoom in using a configurable keybind (Default 'C')
- 🎬 Smooth zoom animations for cinematic feel
- ⚡ Multiple easing styles: Linear, Ease In, Ease Out, Ease In Out, Exponential
- 🖱️ Adjustable mouse sensitivity while zoomed
- 🎚️ Scroll wheel zoom control
- 📷 Cinematic camera mode
- 📷 Vanilla smooth camera support
- 🔄 Toggle or hold-to-zoom mode
- 🎯 Custom minimum and maximum zoom levels
- 🔭 Optional spyglass overlay
- 🔊 Optional zoom sound effect
- ⚙️ Fully configurable via YACL + Mod Menu

### 📦 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.11, 26.x
- Java 21+
- Fabric Loader 0.19.2 or newer
- Fabric API
- Yet Another Config Lib v3 (YACL)
